summary: Bug fix verification: CHECKED_IN enum removal from availability API - All tests PASSED. The fix correctly removes CHECKED_IN from database queries (which doesn't exist as enum value), and now API returns 34 blocked dates including March 20-22. Frontend calendar properly disables blocked dates, submit button is disabled until valid dates selected, and real-time availability check works before submission.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'

critical_code_review_comments: Code fix is correct - CHECKED_IN was removed from all queries in availability, ical, and reviews routes
The availability API now uses valid enum values: ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PAID'] for blocking dates
Frontend properly uses blockedDates from API to disable calendar cells
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. CHECKED_IN enum removal working. API returns 34 blocked dates. Calendar properly disables March 20-22. Submit button disabled until valid dates selected.

availability_api_returns_blocked_dates.evidence: GET /api/v2/listings/lst-test-final-1772285152/availability returns blockedDates array with 34 dates including 2026-03-20, 2026-03-21, 2026-03-22

calendar_disables_blocked_dates.evidence: Playwright test confirmed Day 20, 21, 22 all have disabled=True in DOM

blocked_dates_unclickable.evidence: Clicking blocked dates does not select them - DOM disabled property prevents selection

submit_disabled_until_dates_selected.test: Submit button disabled when no dates selected
submit_disabled_until_dates_selected.evidence: Button shows 'Select dates' and is_disabled=True before date selection

submit_enabled_for_valid_dates.test: Submit button enabled after selecting valid (non-blocked) dates
submit_enabled_for_valid_dates.evidence: After selecting March 25-27, button shows 'Submit Request (฿73,500)' and is_disabled=False

price_breakdown_displays.test: Price breakdown shown after selecting dates
price_breakdown_displays.evidence: Screenshot shows Rental cost (2 nights): ฿70,000, Service fee (5%): ฿3,500, Total: ฿73,500

loading_state_indicator.test: Loading state shown while fetching availability
loading_state_indicator.evidence: Console shows '[AVAILABILITY] Loaded blocked dates: 34' - component loads availability on mount

real_time_availability_check.test: Real-time availability check before booking submission
real_time_availability_check.evidence: Code at /app/app/listings/[id]/page.js lines 470-486 makes availability API call before submitting booking

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Visual date blocking sync issue - Dates 20-21 March appeared as available but API blocked them
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: CHECKED_IN enum value was used in database queries but doesn't exist in the booking_status enum. Valid values are: PENDING, CONFIRMED, PAID, CANCELLED, COMPLETED, REFUNDED. This caused the bookings query to fail silently, returning 0 bookings when there should be 1.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Removed CHECKED_IN from all queries in: availability/route.js, ical/route.js, reviews/route.js. Now queries use ['PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PAID'] which are valid enum values.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: API now returns 34 blocked dates including March 20-22, and calendar properly disables them
